# thoth_governance_runtime_status (Data Source)

Reads pack runtime status and drift summary for governance enforcement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `environment` (String) Optional environment filter (dev or prod).

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Runtime status payload as JSON.
